user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view time off management settings per employee class showing the calculation start month, so that I can review how leave accrual is configured for each class.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Management screen; When the list loads; Then I see each employee class with its time off calculations start from value

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit the time off settings for an employee class, so that I can set the calculation start month and other accrual rules.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Management screen; When I click Edit on an employee class row and change its settings; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the maximum number of time off(s) that can be approved by an immediate supervisor, so that approval authority is limited appropriately.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am editing an employee class on the Time Off Management screen; When I set the maximum approvable time offs; Then the limit is saved for that class

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the time off management list, so that I see the latest settings per employee class.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Management screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current settings
